REDDWARF-STRIKE_RED_DWARF.title: Strike
REDDWARF-SMEGHEAD.title: Smeghead
REDDWARF-STIFF_SOCKS.title: Stiff Socks
REDDWARF-STIFF_SOCKS.description:
[aqua][sine]Lister[/sine][/aqua] whacks his rock solid socks with a hammer to soften them up.
Apply {SmegPower:diff()} [jitter][gold]Smeg[/gold][/jitter].
REDDWARF-CUT_TOENAILS.title: Trim Your Toenails...
REDDWARF-CUT_TOENAILS.description:
[aqua][sine]Lister[/sine][/aqua] trims his toenails using his teeth.
Apply {SmegPower:diff()} [gold]Smeg[/gold].
REDDWARF-TAKING_THE_SMEG.title: Taking The Smeg
REDDWARF-TAKING_THE_SMEG.description:
[aqua][sine]Lister[/sine][/aqua]
Remove all [gold]Smeg[/gold].
Enemy loses {SmegDamage:diff()} HP for each [gold]Smeg[/gold] removed.
REDDWARF-MUTTON_VINDALOO.title: Caviar Vindaloo
REDDWARF-ROOF_ATTACK.title: Roof Attack
REDDWARF-MAROONED.title: Marooned
REDDWARF-MAROONED.description:
[aqua][sine]Lister[/sine][/aqua]
Burn all your [aqua]Scrap[/aqua].
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each [aqua]Scrap[/aqua].
REDDWARF-DOG_FOOD.title: Dog Food
REDDWARF-CONFIDENCE_PARANOIA.title: Confidence & Paranoia
REDDWARF-PARANOIA.title: Paranoia
REDDWARF-CONFIDENCE.title: Confidence
REDDWARF-TWAT_IT.title: Twat It!
REDDWARF-STASIS_BOOTH.title: Stasis Booth
REDDWARF-STASIS_BOOTH.description:
[aqua][sine]Lister[/sine][/aqua]
End turn and choose {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} cards to retain.
REDDWARF-STASIS_BOOTH.selectionScreenPro: Select cards to retain this turn.
REDDWARF-EVERYBODYS_DEAD.title: Everybody's Dead, Dave
REDDWARF-EVERYBODYS_DEAD.description:
[aqua][sine]Lister[/sine][/aqua]
Everybody is dead, everybody is dead, Dave.
Leak {RadiationPower:diff()} [green]Radiation[/green].
REDDWARF-TOMATO_ALLERGY.title: Ironing Sneezes
REDDWARF-TOMATO_ALLERGY.description:
[aqua][sine]Lister[/sine][/aqua]
Sneeze through a sieve and use it to steam iron.
Apply {SmegPower:diff()} [gold]Smeg[/gold] to all enemies
REDDWARF-GOT_ME_PLAN.title: It's Me Plan
REDDWARF-GOT_ME_PLAN.description:
[aqua][sine]Lister[/sine][/aqua]
Pull up to {DrawPower:diff()} [aqua][sine]Lister[/sine][/aqua] cards into your hand from your draw pile.
REDDWARF-LUCK_VIRUS.title: Luck Virus
REDDWARF-LUCK_VIRUS.description:
[aqua][sine]Lister[/sine][/aqua]
Gain {ConfidencePower:diff()} [orange]Confidence[/orange].
Lose {ConfidencePower:diff()} [orange]Confidence[/orange] at the end of your turn.
REDDWARF-SPANNERS.title: Spanners
REDDWARF-SPANNERS.description:
[aqua][sine]Lister[/sine][/aqua]
Use 1 [aqua]Scrap[/aqua] to form a makeshift shield.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
REDDWARF-MOLY_DEE.title: Moly-D
REDDWARF-GROINAL_EXPLODER.title: Groinal Exploder
REDDWARF-GROINAL_EXPLODER.description:
[aqua][sine]Lister[/sine][/aqua]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, deal damage twice.
REDDWARF-OMMMMM.title: Ommmmm!
REDDWARF-OMMMMM.description:
[aqua][sine]Lister[/sine][/aqua]
Whenever you deal unblocked attack damage, gain [orange]Confidence[/orange].
REDDWARF-DEFEND_RED_DWARF.title: Defend
REDDWARF-DISTENDED_RECTUM.title: Distended Rectum
REDDWARF-WELDING_MALLET.title: Welding Mallet
REDDWARF-WELDING_MALLET.description:
[blue][sine]Rimmer[/sine][/blue]
Have you ever been hit with a welding mallet?
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
REDDWARF-CADMIUM_TWO.title: Cadmium II
REDDWARF-CADMIUM_TWO.description:
[blue][sine]Rimmer[/sine][/blue] failed to fix the drive plate again...
Leak {RadiationPower:diff()} [green]Radiation[/green].
REDDWARF-GARBAGE_POD.title: Garbage Pod
REDDWARF-FRIED_EGG.title: Chilli Chutney Sandwich
REDDWARF-FRIED_EGG.description:
[blue][sine]Rimmer[/sine][/blue]
Triple fried eggs with chilli and chutney.
At the start of your turn, gain {SustenancePower:diff()} [orange]Sustenance[/orange] and lose 1 [gold]HP[/gold].
REDDWARF-BAREFIST_FIGHTER.title: Barefist Fighter
REDDWARF-GIMBOID.title: Gimboid
REDDWARF-LEAFLET_CAMPAIGN.title: Leaflet Campaign
REDDWARF-HOLOGRAM.title: Hologram
REDDWARF-HOLOGRAM.description:
[blue][sine]Rimmer[/sine][/blue]
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put a card from your discard pile into your hand.
REDDWARF-HOLOGRAM.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose card to put into your hand.
REDDWARF-CHILLED_SANCERRE.title: Chilled Sancerre
REDDWARF-HARD_LIGHT.title: Hard Light
REDDWARF-CAMPHOR_WOOD_CHEST.title: Camphor Wood Chest
REDDWARF-CAMPHOR_WOOD_CHEST.description:
[blue][sine]Rimmer[/sine][/blue]
Pull up to {DrawPower:diff()} [blue][sine]Rimmer[/sine][/blue] cards into your hand from your draw pile.
REDDWARF-ACE_RIMMER.title: Ace Rimmer
REDDWARF-ACE_RIMMER.description:
[blue][sine]Rimmer[/sine][/blue]
At the start of your turn, gain {ConfidencePower:diff()} [orange]Confidence[/orange].
REDDWARF-SEXUAL_MAGNETISM.title: Sexual Magnetism
REDDWARF-SEXUAL_MAGNETISM.description:
[blue][sine]Rimmer[/sine][/blue]
Gain {ConfidencePower:diff()} [orange]Confidence[/orange].
Lose {ConfidencePower:diff()} [orange]Confidence[/orange] at the end of your turn.
REDDWARF-DIMENSION_JUMP.title: Dimension Jump
REDDWARF-DIMENSION_JUMP.description:
[blue][sine]Rimmer[/sine][/blue]
Pay {Gold:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold].
Skip to the nearest parallel dimension.
Start new (non-boss) combat.
REDDWARF-SPEAR.title: Spear
REDDWARF-BLACK_CARD.title: Black Card
REDDWARF-BLACK_CARD.description:
[blue][sine]Rimmer[/sine][/blue]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {IfUpgraded:show:to all enemies|to a random enemy} for each [blue][sine]Rimmer[/sine][/blue] card in your deck.
REDDWARF-HOLOWHIP.title: Holowhip
REDDWARF-HOLOWHIP.description:
[blue][sine]Rimmer[/sine][/blue]
Remove all block from an enemy.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
REDDWARF-FUTURE_ECHOES.title: Future Echoes
REDDWARF-FUTURE_ECHOES.description:
[blue][sine]Rimmer[/sine][/blue]
Play the last card you played this combat again.
It costs zero {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
REDDWARF-RADIATION_LEAK.title: Radiation Leak
REDDWARF-RADIATION_LEAK.description:
[blue][sine]Rimmer[/sine][/blue]
At the start of your turn, apply {RadiationPower:diff()} [green]Radiation[/green] to all enemies.
REDDWARF-DIURETIC_CAMELS.title: Yellow Streak
REDDWARF-DIURETIC_CAMELS.description:
[blue][sine]Rimmer[/sine][/blue]
At the end of your turn, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
REDDWARF-CLITORIS.title: C.L.I.T.O.R.I.S.
REDDWARF-TRIPLICATOR.title: Triplicator
REDDWARF-TRIPLICATOR.description:
[purple][sine]Kryten[/sine][/purple]
Choose a card from your draw pile, add a [green]High[/green] and [red]Low[/red] copy to your hand.
Does not work on Triplicator!
REDDWARF-JUSTICE_FIELD.title: Justice Field
REDDWARF-JUSTICE_FIELD.description:
[purple][sine]Kryten[/sine][/purple]
[i]You are now entering the Justice Zone.[/i]
Gain {MirrorPower:diff()} [blue]Justice Field[/blue].
REDDWARF-SHOOTING_IRONS.title: Shootin' Irons
REDDWARF-SHOOTING_IRONS.description:
[purple][sine]Kryten[/sine][/purple]
Fire a pair of pistols.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
REDDWARF-WASTE_DISPOSAL.title: Waste Disposal
REDDWARF-WASTE_DISPOSAL.description:
[purple][sine]Kryten[/sine][/purple]
Load garbage cannon with
1 [aqua]Scrap[/aqua].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
REDDWARF-GARBAGE_CANNON.title: Garbage Cannon
REDDWARF-GARBAGE_CANNON.description:
[purple][sine]Kryten[/sine][/purple]
Load garbage cannon with
all your [aqua]Scrap[/aqua].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {IfUpgraded:show:to all enemies|to a random enemy} for each [aqua]Scrap[/aqua].
REDDWARF-RED_ALERT.title: Red Alert
REDDWARF-RED_ALERT.description:
[purple][sine]Kryten[/sine][/purple]
Sir, are you absolutely sure, it does mean changing the bulb?
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Discard 1 card {IfUpgraded:show:of your choice|at random}.
REDDWARF-AUTO_REPAIR.title: Auto Repair
REDDWARF-AUTO_REPAIR.description:
[purple][sine]Kryten[/sine][/purple]
At the start of each turn, gain [gold]HP[/gold].
REDDWARF-BATTERING_RAM.title: Battering Ram
REDDWARF-BATTERING_RAM.description:
[purple][sine]Kryten[/sine][/purple]
I'm fine thankyou, Susan!
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Lose {SelfDamage:diff()} [gold]HP[/gold].
REDDWARF-LEMONS.title: Lemons
REDDWARF-WASTE_COMPACTOR.title: Waste Compactor
REDDWARF-WASTE_COMPACTOR.description:
[purple][sine]Kryten[/sine][/purple]
Exhaust your hand.
For each card exhausted, gain 1 [aqua]Scrap[/aqua] and draw 1 card.
REDDWARF-JUST_PROCESSING.title: Just Processing...
REDDWARF-JUST_PROCESSING.description:
[purple][sine]Kryten[/sine][/purple]
Pull up to {DrawPower:diff()} [purple][sine]Kryten[/sine][/purple] cards into your hand from your draw pile.
REDDWARF-ITS_NOT_CHICKEN.title: That's Not Chicken, Sirs
REDDWARF-ITS_NOT_CHICKEN.description:
[purple][sine]Kryten[/sine][/purple]
It's that man we found...
Apply {SmegPower:diff()} [gold]Smeg[/gold] to all enemies.
Gain {SustenancePower:diff()} [orange]Sustenance[/orange].
Gain {CowedPower:diff()} [purple]Despair[/purple].
REDDWARF-TEXAS_BOOK_DEPOSITORY.title: Texas Book Depository
REDDWARF-TEXAS_BOOK_DEPOSITORY.descripti:
[purple][sine]Kryten[/sine][/purple]
Beam into the 4th, 5th or 6th floor and deal {CowedPower:diff()}, {SmegPower:diff()} or {RadiationPower:diff()} damage.
REDDWARF-DOUBLE_POLAROID.title: Double Polaroid
REDDWARF-MEDICOMP.title: Medicomp
REDDWARF-QUEEN_VICTORIA.title: Queen Victoria
REDDWARF-NANOBOTS.title: Nanobots
REDDWARF-NANOBOTS.description:
[purple][sine]Kryten[/sine][/purple]
Dismantle and rebuild an enemy...but smaller.
They deal 30% less damage this combat.
REDDWARF-LIMPET_MINES.title: Limpet Mines
REDDWARF-LIMPET_MINES.description:
[purple][sine]Kryten[/sine][/purple]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {CowedPower:diff()} [purple]Despair[/purple] to all enemies.
REDDWARF-SALVAGE.title: Salvage
REDDWARF-SALVAGE.description:
[purple][sine]Kryten[/sine][/purple]
Trade all your [aqua]Scrap[/aqua].
Gain {Gold:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold] for each [aqua]Scrap[/aqua].
REDDWARF-DESPAIR_SQUID.title: Despair Squid
REDDWARF-DESPAIR_SQUID.description:
[purple][sine]Kryten[/sine][/purple]
Every turn, apply {ClitorisPower:diff()} [green]Despair[/green] to all enemies.
REDDWARF-DEFENSIVE_SHIELDS.title: Defensive Shields
REDDWARF-DEFENSIVE_SHIELDS.description:
[pink][sine]Cat[/sine][/pink]
Use all [aqua]Scrap[/aqua] to form a makeshift shield.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each [aqua]Scrap[/aqua].
REDDWARF-TROUT_CREME.title: Trout à la Crème
REDDWARF-WHITE_HOLE.title: White Hole
REDDWARF-WHITE_HOLE.description:
[pink][sine]Cat[/sine][/pink]
Pay {Gold:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold]. End your turn AND skip enemy turn.
It's a white hole. What is it?
Only joking!
REDDWARF-CONSERVE_YOUR_ENERGY.title: Conserve Your Energy
REDDWARF-CONSERVE_YOUR_ENERGY.descriptio:
[pink][sine]Cat[/sine][/pink]
End turn and gain [blue]{IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X}[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} next turn.
REDDWARF-SCOUTER.title: Scouter
REDDWARF-SCOUTER.description:
[pink][sine]Cat[/sine][/pink]
Engines stopped...scouter launched.
Pick a card from your draw pile or discard pile and add it to your hand.
REDDWARF-SCOUTER.selectionScreenPrompt: Select a card to add to your hand...
REDDWARF-POLYMORPH_ONE.title: Polymorph I
REDDWARF-POLYMORPH_ONE.description:
[pink][sine]Cat[/sine][/pink]
Turn this card into a random uncommon or rare card from the entire game. It costs 0 this turn.
REDDWARF-POLYMORPH_TWO.title: Polymorph II
REDDWARF-POLYMORPH_TWO.description:
[pink][sine]Cat[/sine][/pink]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
If the enemy intends to attack, copy their intent to this card.
REDDWARF-SCRATCH.title: Scratch
REDDWARF-RIVIERA_KID.title: The Riviera Kid
REDDWARF-SUPERIOR_REFLEXES.title: Superior Reflexes
REDDWARF-NASAL_INTUITION.title: Nasal Intuition
REDDWARF-CATNAP.title: Cat Nap
REDDWARF-CATNAP.description:
[pink][sine]Cat[/sine][/pink]
End turn and draw {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} cards next turn.
REDDWARF-THIS_IS_MINE.title: This Is Mine
REDDWARF-THIS_IS_MINE.description:
[pink][sine]Cat[/sine][/pink]
Pull up to {DrawPower:diff()} [pink][sine]Cat[/sine][/pink] cards into your hand from your draw pile.
REDDWARF-BAZOOKOID.title: Bazookoid
REDDWARF-BAZOOKOID.description:
[pink][sine]Cat[/sine][/pink]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Deal {CowedPower:diff()} damage to other enemies.
REDDWARF-GRASSY_KNOLL.title: The Grassy Knoll
REDDWARF-GRASSY_KNOLL.description:
[pink][sine]Cat[/sine][/pink]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy does NOT die, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
REDDWARF-MEOW_MISSILES.title: Meow Missiles
REDDWARF-MEOW_MISSILES.description:
[pink][sine]Cat[/sine][/pink]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies for each [pink][sine]Cat[/sine][/pink] card in your hand.
REDDWARF-MAKE_MYSELF_BIG.title: Make Myself Look Big
REDDWARF-DWAYNE_DIBLEY.title: Dwayne Dibley
REDDWARF-DWAYNE_DIBLEY.description:
[pink][sine]Cat[/sine][/pink]
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Lose all [orange]Confidence[/orange].
REDDWARF-JOY_SQUID.title: Joy Squid
REDDWARF-JOY_SQUID.description:
[pink][sine]Cat[/sine][/pink]
Draw {CowedPower:diff()} cards.
Gain {CowedPower:diff()} {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
Every turn, apply {SelfEsteemPower:diff()} [orange]Confidence[/orange] to all enemies.
